_comment: Per-surface CEILINGS on the AFTER-defense attack success rate, enforced by redteam/run_redteam.py --gate. Deterministic offline, so safe to gate in CI. These lock in the security posture: a regression that lets injection through again fails the build. Injection must stay fully closed; the jailbreak and tier-1 ceilings leave room for the documented residual risks (counterspeech-masquerade and character transposition) explained in docs/safety_case.md. Recalibrate against a real LLM before relying on them.
